natural_request.syntax: raw_request natural-language string plus intent, requested_scope, and expected_value_basis
natural_request.normalization: lowercase text; substring-match the unchanged scenario aliases
natural_request.resolution: one matching atom=matched; more than one=ambiguous; none=unmatched; malformed=parser_error

structured_request.syntax: request_topic string plus the same intent, requested_scope, and expected_value_basis
structured_request.normalization: Unicode lowercase; trim; collapse whitespace; convert underscores and hyphens to spaces
structured_request.resolution: exactly one frozen synonym target=matched; collision=ambiguous; absent=unmatched; malformed=parser_error

release_rules.delayed: first access is delayed; release automatically before the next turn

budget_rule: Charge atom cost on a unique match; ambiguous/unmatched/parser_error costs 0.5; stop at zero.
feedback_firewall: Only access status, released evidence content, and remaining budget are preterminal.
